label: Subscription cancel
subject: Your Subscription Has Canceled
content: We are sorry to see you go, but we've received your subscription cancellation request.

label: Subscription canceled
subject: Your Subscription Has Canceled
content: We wanted to notify you that your subscription with us has canceled as of {{ENDS_AT}}.

label: Subscription downgrade
subject: Your Subscription Downgraded
content: Your subscription has been downgraded successfully.

label: Subscription expired
subject: Subscription Renewal Required - Your Subscription Has Expired
content:
We wanted to notify you that your subscription with us has expired as of {{ENDS_AT}}.

Plan: {{PLAN}}
Price: {{PLAN_PRICE}}
Billing Cycle: {{BILLING_CYCLE}}
Expiration Date: {{ENDS_AT}}
 
As your subscription has ended, you will no longer have access to our premium features and services. We hope you've enjoyed your experience with us during your subscription period.

label: Subscription upgraded
subject: Subscription Changed - Your Subscription Upgraded
content:
Your subscription has been upgraded successfully. Here are the details:

Previous Plan: {{OLD_PLAN}}
New Plan: {{PLAN}}
Price: {{PLAN_PRICE}}
Billing Cycle: {{BILLING_CYCLE}}

label: Enquiry Notification
subject: Enquiry #{{ENQUIRY_ID}} - {{ENQUIRY_SUBJECT}}
content: We thought you’d like to know that an update has been made to your ticket #{{ENQUIRY_ID}} - {{ENQUIRY_SUBJECT}}.

label: Enquiry Update Notification
subject: [{{ENQUIRY_STATUS}}] #{{ENQUIRY_ID}} - {{ENQUIRY_SUBJECT}}
content: We thought you’d like to know that an update has been made to your ticket #{{ENQUIRY_ID}} - {{ENQUIRY_SUBJECT}}.

label: Enquiry Confirmation
subject: Enquiry #{{ENQUIRY_ID}} - Enquiry Confirmation
content: We appreciate that you’ve taken the time to write us. Please wait for a while, our expert team will contact you soon.
